; PgBouncer auth file.
; Replace PG_PASSWORD_PLACEHOLDER with the real PostgreSQL password at deploy
; time. The quoted username must match the PG_USER used by the services
; (default: zutomayo; adjust the first quoted field accordingly).
; When using the edoburu/pgbouncer image with DB_USER/DB_PASSWORD env vars, this
; file is auto-generated and this template is not used.
"postgres" "PG_PASSWORD_PLACEHOLDER"
